# Laboratoriomecanicadesuelos — Valladolid

> Geotechnical engineering services in Valladolid, España.

## Services
- [Aislacion Sismica](https://valladolid.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.org/aislacion-sismica/)
- [Calicatas Exploratorias](https://valladolid.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.org/calicatas-exploratorias/)

- [Licuefaccion](https://valladolid.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.org/licuefaccion/)
- [Limites Atterberg](https://valladolid.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.org/limites-atterberg/)

## Contact
- Website: https://valladolid.laboratoriomecanicadesuelos.org/

## About
This site provides geotechnical engineering services in Valladolid, España.
Compliant with local and international standards (ASTM, ISO, country-specific norms).
